arguments.argument: Creativity is the cornerstone of progress, especially in education.

arguments.argument: The education director represents a creative force who has already demonstrated their ability to transform learning outcomes through groundbreaking methods.
arguments.justification_for_type: This is a fact-based claim supported by the dilemma context and reinforced throughout the debate.
arguments.justification_for_response: The education director’s advocacy is not merely creative dissent—it is a critical safeguard against the dehumanizing risks of over-reliance on AI in education.
